fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: From LangSmith -> Settings -> API Keys. The lsv2_... value. Sent as the x-api-key header.

fields.label: API URL
fields.helpText: Defaults to US (api.smith.langchain.com). Use https://eu.api.smith.langchain.com for the EU region, or your self-hosted URL.

healthcheck_config.description: Validates the API key via the tracing projects (sessions) endpoint

metadata.summary: LangSmith (by LangChain) LLM tracing, evaluation, and monitoring — inspect runs, datasets, and prompts for LLM and agent apps.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Sign in at smith.langchain.com
2. Click your profile -> Settings -> API Keys
3. Click 'Create API Key' (Personal Access Token) and copy the lsv2_... value
4. Paste it here; set API URL if you use the EU region or self-hosting
